title: Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System
design_question: How to achieve ≥1-week battery autonomy from solar for a remote IoT node?
selected_approach: 60×90 mm 1 W solar panel + 3.2 V 2 Ah LiFePO₄ via CN3791 MPPT charge controller. ESP32 deep sleep between 15-min cycles. Avg I ≈ 24 µA @ 96 µW.
rationale: LiFePO₄: safer chemistry, 2000+ cycle life, tolerates outdoor temp. 1 W panel at 2 PSH gives 2 Wh/day—83× the 24 µW needed.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Non-rechargeable; ≈83 h at 14.6 µA average—monthly replacement—rejected.

verification_notes: FACT: 'Solar Panel Sizing' formula P = E_daily/(η·PSH) confirms 0.038 W minimum—well under 1 W panel. FACT: 'Low-Power Microcontroller Sleep Modes' confirms I_avg formula.
supporting_fact_titles: Solar Panel Sizing for Remote IoT Stations
Li-Ion Battery Capacity and Energy Calculation
